message:
fix: correct ext4 DX directory parser layout and adjust test mock GDT placement

DX parser (ffs-ondisk/src/ext4.rs):
- Fix dx_countlimit interpretation: structure is 4 bytes (limit u16 +
  count u16), not 8 as previously assumed
- Correct entry offset calculation: entries start at +4 after countlimit,
  not +8
- Add count > limit validation to reject malformed directory entries
- Update test to match corrected layout

Test mocks (ffs-extent, ffs-inode):
- Move mock_pctx GDT block from 1 to 50 to avoid collision with
  group-0 bitmap block that caused spurious allocation test failures
- Thread persist_ctx parameter through allocate_extent and set_times
  test call sites to match updated API signatures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
